business_question: Which stores have consistently improved sales over the last three months?
business_context: Regional leaders want to identify high-performing stores and replicate successful practices.
sql_answer:
WITH monthly_sales AS (
SELECT
st.STORE_NAME,
d.YEAR,
d.MONTH,
SUM(s.NET_UNITS_SOLD) AS SALES
FROM FACT_SALES s
JOIN DIM_STORE st
ON s.STORE_KEY = st.STORE_KEY
JOIN DIM_DATE d
ON s.DATE_KEY = d.DATE_KEY
GROUP BY st.STORE_NAME, d.YEAR, d.MONTH
)
SELECT
STORE_NAME,
YEAR,
MONTH,
SALES,
SALES -
LAG(SALES) OVER (
PARTITION BY STORE_NAME
ORDER BY YEAR, MONTH
) AS SALES_CHANGE
FROM monthly_sales;
